_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE TEMPLATE ONLY — not maintained compliance content.

gates.description: Scan for hardcoded credentials patterns in staged files.
gates.command: grep -rEn '(password|passwd|secret|api_key|apikey|token|private_key)\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27]{8,}["\x27]' --include='*.py' --include='*.js' --include='*.ts' --include='*.json' --include='*.yaml' --include='*.yml' . && echo 'Potential hardcoded credentials found — review required' && exit 1 || echo 'secret_scan: no hardcoded credential patterns detected'

gates.description: Verify no credentials committed via git-secrets or equivalent.
gates.command: echo 'no_hardcoded_credentials: ILLUSTRATIVE — replace with git-secrets or truffleHog command'
